hooks.command: jq -r 'if (.prompt // "") | startswith("/") then (.prompt | split(" ")[0] | ltrimstr("/")) else empty end' | { read -r skill; [ -n "$skill" ] && jq -nc --arg s "$skill" --argjson e "$(date +%s)" --arg iso "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" '{skill:$s, start:$iso, start_epoch:$e}' > /tmp/claude-skill-current.json; } 2>/dev/null || true

[ -f /tmp/claude-skill-current.json ] && jq -c --argjson now "$(date +%s)" '{skill, start, duration_sec: ($now - .start_epoch)}' /tmp/claude-skill-current.json >> /Users/euiyongshin/study/my-claude-os/logs/skill-usage.jsonl && rm -f /tmp/claude-skill-current.json 2>/dev/null || true
